primary_research.title: Agentic Context Engineering: Evolving Contexts for Self-Improving Language Models
transferable_recommendations: maintain an evolving context playbook rather than repeatedly rewriting one short summary
apply incremental generation reflection and curation updates
preserve detailed knowledge and provenance to prevent context collapse
learn from natural execution feedback without requiring weight updates

primary_research.title: Learning Agent Routing From Early Experience
transferable_recommendations: build a compact route-experience memory from paired executions on a seed set
retrieve similar prior cases before deciding direct inference versus full agent execution
include rubric-guided task-boundary reasoning in the route decision
measure route regret latency and semantic utility instead of ranking models globally

primary_research.title: From Experience to Strategy: Empowering LLM Agents with Trainable Graph Memory
transferable_recommendations: abstract raw trajectories into structured decision paths
distill reusable strategies separately from case-specific facts
attach empirical utility and failure evidence to learned strategies
retrieve strategies dynamically by task state rather than injecting all experience

primary_research.title: GraphPlanner: Graph Memory-Augmented Agentic Routing for Multi-Agent LLMs
transferable_recommendations: represent queries agents roles and outcomes in a heterogeneous route graph
choose both execution model and agent role at each workflow step
use historical workflow memory for unseen-task routing
optimize task performance and compute cost jointly

hermes_community_risk_signals.risk: built-in keyword FTS5 search and semantic memory-provider retrieval may remain separate
hermes_community_risk_signals.design_response: record retrieval backend and support future hybrid keyword plus semantic search

hermes_community_risk_signals.risk: retrieval may become slow when a matching long session is expanded too broadly
hermes_community_risk_signals.design_response: use bounded discovery then local scroll around hits and never load a whole long session by default

hermes_community_risk_signals.risk: delegate_task cannot act as a durable asynchronous work queue
hermes_community_risk_signals.design_response: reserve delegation for bounded current-turn work and use cron or durable process execution for independent work

hermes_community_risk_signals.risk: shared profile or home directories can leak sessions memory and routine state
hermes_community_risk_signals.design_response: assign a unique profile identity and isolated HERMES_HOME state database memory skills and cron stores per experiment

hermes_community_risk_signals.risk: cron sessions may skip memory or external memory providers depending on runtime version and configuration
hermes_community_risk_signals.design_response: routine prompts must carry an explicit context capsule and may not assume interactive-session memory availability

hermes_community_risk_signals.risk: a scheduled routine may not resume the originating interactive conversation
hermes_community_risk_signals.design_response: persist routine purpose state pointers workdir skills provider model and delivery target explicitly
